summary: Successfully tested final adjustments for Business Environment and FDI features. All features working correctly: (1) confidence.date_range is Oct 2017 to Feb 2026 without one-month lag, (2) Y-axis for Overview and Sector charts is 0-100, (3) FDI includes full history from July 1997 to Jan 2026 with 343 data points, (4) FDI color semantics correct - increase=green, decrease=red.
passed_tests: FDI has 343 data points covering full 28-year history
FDI latest value structure includes value, month, date, unit
FDI color semantics: +228.61% MoM shows as GREEN (positive class)
FDI color semantics: -26.53% YoY shows as RED (negative class)
Overview chart X-axis ends at Feb 26
Sector All Trends Y-axis domain is 0-100
Sector All Trends date range shows Oct 2017 - Feb 2026
FDI modal opens with 'All' time range showing Jul 97 to Jan 26
seed_data_creation: None needed - data fetched live from SBP EasyData API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All final adjustments verified: (1) Business Environment date ranges now show full Oct 2017 - Feb 2026 window without one-month lag, (2) Y-axis domain on Overview and Sector charts is correctly set to [0, 100], (3) FDI API fetches full history from July 1997 with start_date='1997-07-01' returning 343 data points, (4) FDI card in Economic panel shows green for increases and red for decreases per standard financial semantics. The SBPDataModal.js handles isFDI flag for proper formatting and color logic.
